controller_model: Autopilot APE3100 CUMULUS S50 Digital CO2 Controller

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APE3100 CUMULUS S50 Digital CO2 Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: APGP0400 (4-burner LP), APGN0400 (4-burner NG), APCG8LP (8-burner LP)
compatible_devices.notes: ppm Up mode designed specifically for LP or NG CO2 generator systems; activates generator when CO2 drops below setpoint. Main outlet rated 14.5A max at 120V. Unit is US 120V/60Hz only; step-down transformer required for German 230V mains.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APE3100 CUMULUS S50 Digital CO2 Controller
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Ares 2 (2-burner LP), Ares 4 (4-burner LP), Ares 6 (6-burner LP)
compatible_devices.notes: Any 120V LP or NG CO2 generator compatible via ppm Up mode; specific Titan Controls Ares series compatibility inferred from universal 120V outlet standard. 14.5A max outlet.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APE3100 CUMULUS S50 Digital CO2 Controller
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Fuzzy Logic mode improves CO2 delivery efficiency and minimizes gas waste from tank systems
compatible_devices.notes: Fuzzy Logic mode specifically designed for compressed CO2 tank + solenoid regulator systems: controller modulates solenoid duty cycle to reduce CO2 overshoot and waste. Any 120V solenoid-equipped CO2 regulator from any brand compatible. 14.5A max outlet.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot APE3100 CUMULUS S50 Digital CO2 Controller
compatible_devices.notes: ppm Down mode activates exhaust fan when CO2 exceeds setpoint. On/off control only, no variable speed. Optional 24V adapter (included) allows linking to APE4100 or other compatible environmental controllers to interlock CO2 output with exhaust fan state, preventing CO2 waste during ventilation cycles. 14.5A max outlet.
